title: Two live assistant renderer tests run in a Go container without Node

createdViaParent.expansionReason: Active runtime exposes no runSubagent/agent tool; bugfix-fastlane is not a top-level-runtime-required mode, so bubbles.workflow (dispatched by bubbles.iterate) executes each phase owner's contract inline. implement is the committed 8ac848e1 fix (Node bootstrap: scripts/runtime/_ensure_node.sh +27, scripts/runtime/go-e2e.sh +34/-1, internal/deploy/assistant_e2e_package_contract_test.go +174, tests/e2e/assistant/legacy_retirement_notice_test.go +11/-2, docs +17); test/regression were RE-VERIFIED live this session — the contract revert-reverify (RED: removing ensure_node "go-e2e" FAILs TestAssistantE2EPrerequisitesContract_LiveSources at assistant_e2e_package_contract_test.go:126; GREEN: byte-exact git checkout HEAD restore) plus two live E2E legs (isolated renderer ISO_E2E_EXIT=0, both TestLegacyRetirementNoticeE2E_ PASS; full assistant package 62 PASS / 7 SKIP with only 2 foreign buildvcs FAIL, DI-075-002-01); simplify/stabilize are bounded direct reviews; security/validate/audit carry prior operator-attested specialist provenance plus this session's guard-backed reconciliation (state-transition-guard PASS, artifact-lint exit 0).

executionHistory.summary: Root-cause fix committed in 8ac848e1: a shared idempotent scripts/runtime/_ensure_node.sh (+27) is sourced and invoked (ensure_node "go-e2e") by scripts/runtime/go-e2e.sh (+34/-1) BEFORE cd /workspace, supplying Node inside the repository-managed Debian Go tooling container; an adversarial source contract internal/deploy/assistant_e2e_package_contract_test.go (+174) proves the bootstrap invocation cannot silently disappear; the two renderer tests keep their fatal exec.LookPath("node") prerequisite (tests/e2e/assistant/legacy_retirement_notice_test.go +11/-2); docs/Testing.md (+16) and docs/Development.md (+1) document the assistant-only package + Node prerequisite. Test-toolchain-only change; no production image, JS renderer behavior, response contract, deployment, release-train, or secret surface touched. The helper installs from the container's trusted package source and verifies node after install (fail-loud; no host Node/npm; no NO-DEFAULTS fallback).

Current-session genuine re-verification (good-neighbor; no foreign stack evicted). Contract revert-reverify on the committed tree: RED — removing the load-bearing ensure_node "go-e2e" invocation makes TestAssistantE2EPrerequisitesContract_LiveSources FAIL at assistant_e2e_package_contract_test.go:126 ('go-e2e.sh must source _ensure_node.sh and call ensure_node'), exit 1; GREEN — byte-exact git checkout HEAD -- scripts/runtime/go-e2e.sh restores it and the contract returns PASS, exit 0. Live isolated renderer E2E leg (a): ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant --go-run '^TestLegacyRetirementNoticeE2E_' -> TestLegacyRetirementNoticeE2E_OpenWindow... (0.16s) + _NonRetired... (0.32s) PASS with Node installed inside the container ([go-e2e] nodejs install OK), ISO_E2E_EXIT=0, clean teardown. Evidence in report.md 'Live E2E' + 'Contract Revert-Reverify'.

Current-session broader regression leg (b): ./smackerel.sh test e2e --go-package assistant -> 62 PASS / 7 SKIP; the two in-boundary renderer tests, the neighboring TestLegacyRetirementPauseE2E_*/TestLegacyRetirementReport_E2E_*, and every other assistant flow are GREEN. The only 2 failures are the SAME pre-existing foreign build-environment failure (TestIntentReplayE2E_* in intent_replay_test.go -> replay CLI go build fails with 'error obtaining VCS status: exit status 128 / Use -buildvcs=false', at :187/:224) in the spec-069 intent-replay subsystem, outside this change boundary, not caused by this change (working tree packet-only), dispositioned DI-075-002-01 (G051/G095). PKG_E2E_EXIT=1 attributable ONLY to the foreign failures. No product regression; no findings to route.

n/a with provenance. Bounded review: the fix follows the existing _ensure_envsubst.sh convention already present in scripts/runtime/go-e2e.sh (source a checked-in helper, call it before the workspace). It adds one idempotent helper (ensure_node) plus one invocation and reuses the established fail-loud tooling-bootstrap ordering. No new type, abstraction, provider registry, indirection, or fallback introduced; a generic tool registry was explicitly rejected in design.md because Node is required only by the assistant renderer lane. Nothing to simplify.

n/a with provenance. Bounded stability review: test-toolchain-only change; zero production-image / Compose / container-lifecycle / schema / NATS / migration changes; the helper is idempotent (short-circuits when node is already present) and fail-loud (verifies node after install, returns nonzero on failure). The disposable stack is torn down cleanly on exit in both live E2E legs (all containers Removed, volumes Removed, network Removed — good-neighbor). No shared-fixture coupling introduced.
